title: Beauty Specialist
description:
We're looking only mature mid-career individual to join the team! We will provide you with Full Training!

Highlights and Duration

✅Located :Central Area Singapore

✅Working hour :10am-8pm (Sunday/PH : 10am-6pm)

✅Salary: $2,300

✅For 6 months period without CPF (can be converted to full time EARLIER) and all CPF and Commission benefits if candidate will be entitled

✅Good career development, provide job training & professional certificate

✅Opportunities promote Master /Trainer /Outlet Manager

✅Welcome Singaporean/PR

Role Description / Specific Responsibilities / Competencies

👉The Company will be providing a Training on face lifting treatments and Bo Jin Meridian therapy.

👉Managing client appointments and ensuring a smooth booking process.

👉Providing professional consultation and recommending suitable treatments to clients.

👉Creating and posting marketing content related to beauty and wellness treatments.

👉Maintaining cleanliness and hygiene of treatment rooms and equipment.

postedCompany.description:
Welcome to Inyeon TCM Wellness, a distinguished wellness company in Singapore. 

Our holistic approach to skincare and wellness services is deeply rooted in Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) principles, with a particular focus on facial meridian therapy to harmonize the body's energy flow.


At Inyeon, we take pride in our team of highly-trained professionals who employ the latest techniques and technologies to deliver personalized care, helping you achieve optimal results in your wellness journey. In addition to our cutting-edge therapies, we also offer a range of wellness products, including our exclusive DR.SOS cream.


Behind the scenes, our dedicated Product Development Technical Services (PDTS) team continuously innovates and enhances our offerings to maintain our position as industry leaders.


The name "Inyeon" carries a profound meaning in Korean, symbolizing the harmony and equilibrium of energy flow within the body. We firmly believe that our destiny is intertwined with our valued staff, trusted business partners, and cherished clients. Our commitment to nurturing meaningful relationships with all our stakeholders is unwavering.

Embark on your wellness journey with us and experience revitalization like never before. Inyeon – where harmony meets wellness."


Rochor/Bugis Outlet:

Address: 175 Bencoolen Street, #01-37 Burlington Square, 189649 Singapore

Nearest MRT: Rochor (Just 50m walking distance)

Somerset/Orchard Outlet:

Address: 111 Somerset Rd, #02-34 TripleOne Somerset, Singapore 238164

Nearest MRT: Somerset/Orchard (Walking distance)
